stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which statement is correct regarding the pitching moment coefficient CM versus angle of attack diagram?

options.a: Line 4 shows an aeroplane with reducing static longitudinal stability at very high angles of attack.
options.b: Line 3 shows an aeroplane with greater static longitudinal stability at low angles of attack than that shown in line 4.
options.c: Line 3 shows an aeroplane with increasing static longitudinal stability at high angles of attack.
options.d: Line 1 shows an aeroplane with increasing static longitudinal instability at very high angles of attack.
